meaning: n.机会,可能性,偶然性,运气v.碰巧,偶然发生,冒...的险adj.偶然的
examples: Chess is not a game of chance.
Everyone has a chance to win.
It was a chance to start afresh.
In the Middle East, Chance reported extensively from Iraq in the aftermath of the 2003 war.
Chance also led CNN's coverage of the 2008 Russia-Georgia conflict, reporting from the frontlines.
